global.tagline: Global sourcing. Local supply. Operational certainty.

hero.headline: Operational Products for Airlines, Catering & Food Systems
hero.description: MERABA supplies standard, custom, and requested food-service products from international factories - with local supply options and operational certainty when required.
hero.supportingLine: From CPET trays and packaging to onboard service items and custom product needs, MERABA helps evaluate the right supply option for your operation.

productSection.label: Product Categories
productSection.title: Product categories built for operational procurement.
productSection.subtitle: Clear product areas for fast procurement decisions, with room for standard, custom, and requested items used in food-service operations.

consultantTile.title: Contact a Product Consultant
consultantTile.shortText: For product requirements, custom items, or supply questions.

whyMeraba.label: Why MERABA
whyMeraba.title: Product supply with the discipline large operations expect.
whyMeraba.intro: A clear product request helps MERABA evaluate the right supply path without turning every inquiry into a large program.

items.title: Product supplier first
items.description: Customers can start with one product, a custom item, or a defined recurring requirement.

items.title: Requirement-based review
items.description: Product, quantity, destination, and timeline guide the most suitable supply path.

items.title: International factory network
items.description: Factory access for standard, custom, and large-quantity product needs.

items.title: Operational certainty
items.description: Clear communication when documentation, storage, or recurring availability matters.

supplyModel.label: Supply Model
supplyModel.title: Simple product supply. Support when the order requires it.
supplyModel.intro: MERABA supplies products first. Sourcing, documentation, storage, and coordination capabilities can be added when the order needs them.
supplyModel.reviewText: Tell us what your operation needs. MERABA reviews the product, quantity, destination, and timeline before recommending a practical supply option.

steps.title: Product Requirement
steps.description: Item, quantity, destination, timeline, and any specification notes.

steps.title: Supply Path Review
steps.description: MERABA reviews whether the requirement fits standard supply, custom production, or a requested product path.

steps.title: Factory Sourcing / Production
steps.description: Factory options or production coordination are handled when required.

steps.title: Quality & Documentation
steps.description: Specifications, samples, and documents can be supported when needed.

steps.title: Local Supply to Client
steps.description: Approved product supplied according to the agreed delivery plan.

industries.label: Industries Served
industries.title: Built for large food-service operations.
industries.intro: MERABA supplies product requirements used across aviation, catering, food production, and institutional meal-service environments.

finalCta.label: Contact
finalCta.title: Looking for a reliable product supplier?
finalCta.text: Tell us what product you need, the required quantity, destination, and timeline. MERABA will help evaluate the best supply option.

hero.label: Products
hero.headline: Food-service products supplied for operational use.
hero.description: Customers can request a standard item, a custom product, an additional relevant product, or recurring supply requirement. The product comes first.

intro.label: Product Families
intro.title: Clear product areas for fast procurement decisions.
intro.text: These categories represent common product areas. MERABA can also help with additional operational food-service products based on the required item, quantity, destination, and timeline.

requestedProduct.label: Need another product?
requestedProduct.title: Send the product requirement.
requestedProduct.text: If the product is used in operational food-service, catering, onboard service, packaging, or institutional meal systems, MERABA can help evaluate sourcing, production, and supply options.

quoteCta.label: Quote Request
quoteCta.title: Start with the product.
quoteCta.text: Share the item, quantity, destination, and timeline. Support can be added around the product when needed.

hero.label: About MERABA
hero.headline: A supplier of food-service and operational products.
hero.description: Established in 2022, MERABA supplies standard, custom, and requested products used by airlines, catering companies, food manufacturers, and institutional food-service systems.

companyStatement.label: Who MERABA Is
companyStatement.title: Supplier first. Additional support when required.
companyStatement.text: MERABA helps customers obtain food-service and operational products from international factories, with local supply options and practical coordination when the order requires it.
companyStatement.secondaryText: Customers can request listed categories or additional relevant products based on the required item, quantity, destination, and timeline.

whatSupplies.label: What MERABA Supplies
whatSupplies.title: Operational product categories and requested product needs.

howWorks.label: How MERABA Works
howWorks.title: A practical review before supply begins.
howWorks.intro: A clear product request helps MERABA evaluate the right supply path and communicate what is realistic.

items.title: Requirement first
items.description: MERABA reviews the item, quantity, destination, timeline, and practical use case.

items.title: Product path
items.description: The requirement is matched to standard supply, custom production, or requested product evaluation.

items.title: Clear coordination
items.description: Communication stays focused on the product, documents, delivery needs, and recurring availability.

support.label: How MERABA Supports Customers
support.title: Support is added around the product when needed.

cta.label: Product Requirement
cta.title: Looking for a supplier for a specific product?
cta.text: Start with the product. MERABA can review the requirement and help evaluate the right supply option for operational food-service use.

hero.label: Contact
hero.headline: Request a product quote.
hero.description: Share the product, quantity, destination, and timeline. MERABA will review the requirement and help evaluate the appropriate supply option.

formIntro.label: B2B Product Inquiry
formIntro.title: Looking for a reliable product supplier?
formIntro.text: Use the form for a listed product, a custom item, an additional relevant operational food-service product, or an ongoing supply requirement.
formIntro.reviewText: A clear request helps MERABA understand the product path, required quantity, destination, and timing before responding.
